metadata.claim_policy: Evidence-first; unsupported certainty claims are blocked.

objects.title: Dashboard JSON Binding
objects.summary: The dashboard reads local JSON files and renders KPI details from evidence-linked objects.
objects.risk: Browser proof is still required after GitHub Pages refresh.
objects.next_action: Verify root JSON fetches from the final live URL.

objects.title: Root JSON Files
objects.summary: dashboard_state.json, evidence_objects.json, and quarantine_register.json are defined as root dashboard dependencies.
objects.risk: Direct URL availability depends on GitHub Pages serving the latest main branch.
objects.next_action: Open each JSON URL after commit propagation.

objects.title: Attribution Certainty Hold
objects.summary: No attribution-quality certainty is asserted in the repaired dashboard.
objects.risk: Approved analytics evidence is required before any stronger attribution claim.
objects.next_action: Validate attribution chain through approved analytics evidence.

objects.title: CRM and HubSpot Write Hold
objects.summary: HubSpot read/validation may inform recommendations, but writes are not included in this repair.
objects.risk: CRM truth remains unverified in this dashboard until approved evidence is connected.
objects.next_action: Validate CRM truth in read-only mode when approved evidence is available.

objects.title: SA-04 QA Gate
objects.summary: Public or client-facing approval requires SA-04 QA and proof-pack validation.
objects.risk: Local or static visual inspection is not production proof.
objects.next_action: Run browser, responsive, visual, and proof-pack validation.

objects.title: Internal-Only Release Label
objects.summary: The dashboard labels the current state as internal only and keeps Founder decision at HOLD.
objects.risk: Client-facing release remains blocked until approved.
objects.next_action: Approve, hold, reject, or escalate after QA.

objects.title: Quarantine Register
objects.summary: Unsupported certainty claims and missing proof items are listed in quarantine_register.json.
objects.risk: Items must not be converted to claims until evidence is verified.
objects.next_action: Review quarantined items and assign validation owners.
